query:
SELECT 
            a.ticker as "ticker!", 
            a.nombre as "nombre!", 
            a.categoria_id::text as "categoria_id?", 
            c.nombre as "categoria_nombre?",
            g.color as "color?"
        FROM activos a
        LEFT JOIN categorias c ON a.categoria_id = c.id
        LEFT JOIN grupos g ON c.grupo_id = g.id
        ORDER BY a.nombre ASC
